smoke.detail: Box smoke (linux-64; py3.11, fame3r 2.0.0, cdpkit 1.2.3 manylinux wheel, scikit-learn, numpy, rdkit) verified from the pushed branch checked out in an isolated box git worktree. (1) `pixi install --locked` off the committed lock, exit 0. (2) build_model.py trained the in-house RandomForestClassifier (FAME3R default hyperparameters, radius=5, random_state=0) on the shipped metatrans_autoannotated_cleaned/train.sdf: 41712 atoms / 3166 SOMs -> data/models (gitignored weights). (3) evaluate_model.py scored the shipped held-out test.sdf (591 molecules, 14453 atoms, 1052 SoMs): per-atom ROC-AUC=0.902, average precision (PR-AUC)=0.497, top-1 SoM recovery=0.621, top-2=0.773, top-3=0.855 (cached to data/models/eval_metrics.json). (4) run.py on the FTO-43 fixture emits raw predict_proba[:,1] per-atom SoM probability with the RDKit atom index attached in raw.atoms (fixture placeholder CC(=O)O -> 4 atoms: idx0 C 0.308, idx1 C 0.68, idx2 O 0.024, idx3 O 0.364), plus FAME3RScore in uncertainty (ad_index + per-atom list + mean); NO 0.3 threshold / no binary column (landmine); direction UP=SoM (opposite SMARTCyp). (5) `pixi run pytest tests/test_model_fame3r.py -m model -q` in the core env -> 1 passed (36.4s), output validated against core.schemas.OutputRecord.

note: FAME3R v2.0.0 (molinfo-vienna/FAME3R, J.Cheminform 2026) ships sklearn COMPONENTS only (FAME3RVectorizer + FAME3RScoreEstimator, CDPKit-based) and NO trained model; the repo ships train.sdf/test.sdf precisely so the model is trained in-house. This pipeline's PRODUCTION FAME3R model is a RandomForestClassifier trained in-house by build_model.py on the shipped MetaTrans-derived auto-annotated cleaned train.sdf, evaluated on the shipped test.sdf: per-atom ROC-AUC=0.902, PR-AUC=0.497, top-1/2/3 SoM recovery=0.621/0.773/0.855 (ROC-AUC ~0.90 / top-2 ~0.77 is in line with the FAME3R paper). This is an honest, documented modeling choice, NOT a placeholder: deliberately NOT the gated MetaQSAR models (Zenodo 10.5281/zenodo.17223468, restricted access + a UniMi commercial license), which this pipeline does not use. Weights stay gitignored and are rebuilt on the box from the committed lock + build_model.py; provenance.model_source stamps 'fame3r-inhouse: ...' on every record. Landmines honored: raw predict_proba[:,1], NO hard-coded 0.3 threshold (that was legacy Java FAME 3), direction UP=SoM (opposite SMARTCyp; t42 co-ranks ordinally, F-2), reliability=FAME3RScore not Shannon entropy, RDKit atom indices attached (no shipped atom_id). Access CODE-PKG (code MIT); the in-house model inherits the FAME3R dataset license CC-BY-NC-4.0 (non-commercial research; for-profit use needs the upstream commercial terms).
